heading: Up and running in minutes
subheading: Three simple steps to transform your HR operations.

signup.title: Sign up in minutes
signup.description: Create your account in under 2 minutes. No credit card needed, no complex setup. Start working immediately.

import.title: Import your team
import.description: Upload your employee list or add them manually. We handle the data migration so you can focus on people.

manage.title: Start managing HR
manage.description: Recruitment, leave tracking, payroll — everything runs from one dashboard. See results from day one.
